# Talos-SDL Documentation

Welcome to the Talos-SDL project documentation.

## Documentation Sections

* **[Tutorials](tutorials/user_guide.md)**: Conceptual overviews and step-by-step guides for end-users.
* **[API Reference](api/communicate.md)**: Technical documentation automatically generated from the Python source code.

## Project Structure

* **Communicate**: Messaging and protocol handling.
* **Firmware**: Embedded logic and hardware control.
* **Host**: Orchestration and high-level control systems.
* **Shared Lib**: Common utilities used across all modules.
